2606.09399.title: RunAgent SuperBrowser: A Theory of Autonomous Web Navigation Grounded in Human Browsing Behaviour
2606.09399.paper_summary: We present SUPERBROWSER, an autonomous web-navigation agent designed against a single guiding hypothesis: a web agent should browse the way a person browses. A human reading a page does not retain every pixel they have seen; they look at a few candidate targets, decide on one, and remember only what is needed to keep the goal alive. We operationalize this perception-cognition-action triad as three coupled mechanisms. First, a vision-first bounding-box pipeline labels candidate interactive regions on every screenshot and feeds them, asynchronously prefetched, to the language model so that the "eye" precedes the "hand". Second, a three-role brain -- an Orchestrator that classifies and routes, a Planner that evaluates progress every few steps, and a Worker that emits per-step actions -- separates strategic from operational reasoning. Third, a structured Ledger stores only what a person would: the goal, the last three actions, a small set of facts and dead-ends, and a handful of checkpoints; a six-phase eviction loop systematically discards stale screenshots, state blobs, and reasoning traces from the live context. Action execution is a three-tier click cascade (Chrome DevTools Protocol to Puppeteer to scripted) with humanized Bezier motion, plus a chevron-aware bounding-box snapper that resolves the "small arrow beside a large label" ambiguity. On the Mind2Web Hard benchmark (66 tasks), SUPERBROWSER attains 89.47% success, placing third overall and ahead of every published open/research browser-agent baseline by a large margin. We argue that the gain comes not from any single trick but from the consistent application of a cognitive contract throughout the system.
2606.09399.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出SUPERBROWSER，一個自主的網頁導航代理，旨在基於一個單一的指導假設：網頁代理應該像人一樣瀏覽。人類在閱讀一個頁面時並不會保留他們所看到的每一個像素；他們會查看幾個候選目標，決定一個，並只記住維持目標所需的信息。我們將這種知覺-認知-行動三元組操作化為三個耦合機制。首先，一個以視覺為主的邊界框管道在每個截圖上標記候選互動區域，並將它們異步預取到語言模型中，以便“眼睛”在“手”之前。其次，一個三角色的大腦——一個協調者負責分類和路由，一個規劃者每幾步評估進展，和一個工作者發出每一步的行動——將戰略推理與操作推理分開。第三，一個結構化的賬本只存儲一個人會記住的內容：目標、最後三個行動、一小組事實和死胡同，以及少量的檢查點；一個六階段的驅逐循環系統性地丟棄過時的截圖、狀態塊和推理痕跡。行動執行是一個三層的點擊級聯（從Chrome DevTools Protocol到Puppeteer再到腳本化），配有人性化的貝茲運動，以及一個意識到箭頭的邊界框捕捉器，解決了“小箭頭旁邊的大標籤”的歧義。在Mind2Web Hard基準測試（66個任務）中，SUPERBROWSER達到了89.47%的成功率，總體排名第三，並且大幅領先於每個已發表的開放/研究瀏覽器代理基準。我們認為這一增益並不是來自任何單一的技巧，而是來自整個系統中對認知契約的一致應用。
2606.09399.author: Radeen Mostafa et.al.
